title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code in three environments: desktop app, terminal, and VS Code. The tutorial covers setup, configuration with Anthropic API keys, and creation of a Resume and Cover Letter Generator with multiple capabilities including personalized generation, skill suggestions, and theme support.
